title: PAMSPEC working_memory canonical_content 0.1-draft
$comment: Canonical content shape for object_type = 'working_memory'. Persistent so it survives process crashes and can be resumed, but distinct from consolidated long-term memory. Promote via a Promote operation to convert into a canonical Memory Object (typically claim, decision, task, or summary).

task_ref.$comment: Identifier of the task or session this working memory belongs to.

ttl_hint_seconds.$comment: Advisory retention hint. Not authoritative; retention_state governs disposal.

promotion_hint.$comment: Optional hint to a consolidation pass about the object_type this working memory would become if promoted.
